initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT MAX(a.range) AS distance
FROM flights f
JOIN airports_data dep ON f.departure_airport = dep.airport_code
JOIN airports_data arr ON f.arrival_airport = arr.airport_code
JOIN aircrafts_data a ON f.aircraft_code = a.aircraft_code
WHERE dep.city = 'Abakan' OR arr.city = 'Abakan';

SELECT MAX(a.range) AS longest_route_distance
FROM flights f
JOIN airports_data dep ON f.departure_airport = dep.airport_code
JOIN airports_data arr ON f.arrival_airport = arr.airport_code
JOIN aircrafts_data a ON f.aircraft_code = a.aircraft_code
WHERE dep.city = 'Abakan' OR arr.city = 'Abakan';

SELECT MAX(a1.range) AS longest_route_distance
FROM flights f
JOIN airports_data a1 ON f.departure_airport = a1.airport_code
JOIN airports_data a2 ON f.arrival_airport = a2.airport_code
JOIN aircrafts_data ac ON f.aircraft_code = ac.aircraft_code
WHERE (a1.city = 'Abakan' OR a2.city = 'Abakan');

SELECT MAX(a1.range) AS longest_route_distance
FROM flights f
JOIN airports_data a1 ON f.departure_airport = a1.airport_code
JOIN airports_data a2 ON f.arrival_airport = a2.airport_code
JOIN aircrafts_data ac ON f.aircraft_code = ac.aircraft_code
WHERE (a1.city = 'Abakan' OR a2.city = 'Abakan');

SELECT MAX(a1.coordinates) - MAX(a2.coordinates) AS distance_km
FROM flights f
JOIN airports_data a1 ON f.departure_airport = a1.airport_code
JOIN airports_data a2 ON f.arrival_airport = a2.airport_code
WHERE (a1.city = 'Abakan' OR a2.city = 'Abakan');

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT MAX(a1.coordinates) - MAX(a2.coordinates) AS distance_km
FROM flights f
JOIN airports_data a1 ON f.departure_airport = a1.airport_code
JOIN airports_data a2 ON f.arrival_airport = a2.airport_code
WHERE (a1.city = 'Abakan' OR a2.city = 'Abakan');
